question.label: Recognizing contributions
question.name: How do you feel the team's recognition of the payments refactor went, from your perspective?
question.description: Surfaces feelings about recognition and its impact.

answer: I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.

assessment.note: Priya expressed frustration with the lack of progress on mentoring, indicating disengagement.

new_queue.label: Mentoring vision
new_queue.name: What would you want mentoring to look like if you started doing it here?

new_queue.label: Mentoring block
new_queue.name: What's blocked the mentoring from happening — your time, opportunity, or something else?

new_queue.label: Billing rewrite role
new_queue.name: What role do you see yourself playing in the upcoming billing rewrite?

new_queue.label: Support for new projects
new_queue.name: What kind of support do you need from me as new projects start to come into view?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.
